caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!" printed on the chest and a black baseball cap with a gold wing emblem, is seated in a podcast studio. He wears large over-ear headphones and a gold chain. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring stars and the text "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include the "BOSS TALK 101" logo and a "PODCAST" emblem. Across the sequence, the man is initially looking down and smiling, then shifts his gaze slightly as he continues to speak into the microphone. In the final scene, he looks forward with a more neutral expression, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
